Office Fuel Calculator

Mobile-ready weekly fuel-price calculator for Iloilo City based on Petron weekly pump prices

Vehicle and Fuel Details

Choose a vehicle or machinery type, including Marine Engines, or select Others to enter your own.
Select the type or cycle for this equipment.
Select the fuel used by this vehicle or equipment.
Choose the weekly period to auto-load the Iloilo City price, or select Manual Weekly Period.
Use this when you select Manual Weekly Period.
Gasoline uses Xtra Advance (RON 91) or XCS (RON 95). Diesel uses Diesel Max or Turbo Diesel.
Enter distance traveled for vehicle-based computation.
Formula source for ICE vehicles: selected weekly price based on week and fuel product.
Formula: Total Cost = Consumption × Weekly Cost per Liter.

Selected Weekly Price

0.00

Fuel Efficiency

0.00 km/L

Cost per Kilometer

0.00

Total Cost

0.00

Formula

Weekly Cost per Liter = selected weekly fuel price based on Period + Fuel Product
Total Cost of Consumption = Consumption × Weekly Cost per Liter
Fuel Efficiency = Distance ÷ Consumption
Cost per Kilometer = Total Cost ÷ Distance

Calculation Summary Table

Every tap on Calculate adds one row below. Slide left or right to view the full Calculation Summary Table on mobile.
No. Month Year Plate / MVUC / Machinery Vehicle Category Vehicle / Machinery Type Name of Vehicle or Machinery Fuel Type Consumption Distance Weekly Price Total Cost Delete
No calculated entries yet.
Grand Total: 0.00
Total Gasoline Consumption: 0.00 L
Total Diesel Consumption: 0.00 L
Note: This mobile version is based on the uploaded weekly Petron pump prices for Iloilo City. Prices are treated as weekly reference values in pesos per liter, including the Apr 14 rollback values you provided. Chainsaws typically use 2-stroke gasoline engines that need a fuel-oil mix. Grass cutters may use either 2-stroke engines for heavier-duty work or 4-stroke engines for quieter, more fuel-efficient residential use. For electric vehicles, you can manually enter the cost per kWh and total cost.
